name: khamlao
description: Modular Lao language skill for Claude Code. Core rules + domain glossaries that auto-load by conversation context. ~40-60% token savings.

plugins.name: khamlao
plugins.description: ຄຳລາວ — ໂໝດພາສາລາວທີ່ຖືກຕ້ອງ ແລະ ກະທັດຮັດ ສຳລັບ Claude. v1.0 modular: core + 4 auto-load domain glossaries.
